raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Self-declaration of a psychological boundary, affirming a shift from empathy-as-absorption to intentional emotional detachment.",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "The speaker previously acted as an emotional surrogate.",
    "Others' chaos can be absorbed or stabilized by the speaker.",
    "Emotional frequencies can be intentionally handed back.",
    "The speaker's own emotional field can and should remain intact."
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally coherent within a framework of energetic or psychological boundary-setting. The metaphor of 'frequency' and 'field' is consistent throughout the statement.",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": [
    "The speaker is accurately identifying a pattern of emotional enmeshment.",
    "The speaker has the agency and awareness to actually stop absorbing.",
    "The concept of 'handing back frequency' is meaningful and actionable to the speaker."
  ],
  "conditions_for_misleading": [
    "The speaker is using the statement to avoid legitimate emotional responsibility.",
    "Others' distress is actually shared or systemic, not just 'chaos' to be returned.",
    "The statement prevents genuine empathy or necessary relational support.",
    "The speaker is not recognizing their own part in co-creating the dynamic."
  ]
}
